# Onboarding revamp

## Situation
New hires took **three weeks** to ship their first change. The setup guide was
stale and half the steps failed on a fresh laptop.

## What I did
- Rewrote the setup into a single scripted bootstrap.
- Added a smoke test that new hires run on day one.
- Paired with the next two hires and fixed every step that tripped them.

## Result
First-commit time dropped to **four days**. The bootstrap is now the default for
the whole org.
